block_00: Best time for posting & image sizes
block_03: You already run social media channels and post great content. Way to go! Then you'll be glad to know that there are many less obvious yet effective tricks to improve your SMM performance even further.
block_04: Today, we’re breaking down the optimal posting time and image sizes for you to get the most engagement.
block_05: 🕦 The best time to post on social media
block_06: People tend to spend more time on social media in mid-week at lunchtime. Weekend engagement is usually lower because people relax with family and friends and check their phone less often. Here's what research says about the best time to post, depending on the channel.
block_13: Tue and Wed from 10 a.m. to 1 p.m.
block_14: Thu and Fri 10 a.m. and 11 a.m.
block_19: Mon, Tue, Wed, Fri and Sat at 9 a.m.
block_30: *The time is indicated for your audience’s time zone
block_32: Your social media visuals need to be not only of high quality, but also of the right size. This is your guarantee that your audience will see the full visual instead of an incorrectly cropped, weirdly displayed, or pixelated one.
block_33: Our creatives library features high-quality promo materials in different sizes — feel free to get ones to your liking!
block_35: Here are the official image specs for the most popular social networks.
